name: product-seeding-shopify
prompt: I run a DTC skincare brand on Shopify. How do I use Aspire to send free products to micro-influencers and track who actually posts about them?
assertions: Explains how Aspire's Shopify integration handles product seeding — auto-creating orders, variant selection, and shipping tracking
Covers how to track which creators post after receiving products, including content submission tracking and automated reminders
Mentions generating unique promo codes or trackable links per creator for sales attribution

name: discovery-methods
prompt: What are the different ways to find influencers in Aspire? I keep getting irrelevant recommendations.
assertions: Describes multiple discovery methods available in Aspire beyond the default AI matching, such as keyword search, image recognition, or competitor monitoring
Acknowledges the common complaint about AI recommendations returning irrelevant creators and suggests workarounds
Mentions the creator marketplace as an inbound alternative where creators apply to campaigns

name: ugc-paid-social
prompt: I have great UGC from my Aspire influencer campaigns. How do I turn these into paid social ads on TikTok and Meta?
assertions: Explains how to repurpose influencer content for paid ads, covering TikTok Spark Ads or Meta whitelisting
Mentions checking content usage rights in the campaign terms before using creator content in ads
Covers the workflow from content approval in Aspire to ad amplification on at least one paid social platform
